policy: Only sources with explicit hantavirus relation may train the infection classifier. Kaggle and rodent datasets are auxiliary unless a verified dataset slug contains hantavirus-specific image labels.

primaryTrainingSources.name: Image dataset for quantification of virus-infected cells
primaryTrainingSources.hantavirusRelation: Microscopy images of hantavirus-infected cells stained against viral nucleocapsid protein.

primaryTrainingSources.name: Data from: Seoul orthohantavirus evades innate immune activation by reservoir endothelial cells
primaryTrainingSources.modality: immunofluorescence microscopy and raw experiment media
primaryTrainingSources.hantavirusRelation: SEOV/HTNV endothelial-cell infection experiments with microscopy media.

referenceOnly.notes: HPS chest x-ray reference media, not a balanced clinical x-ray dataset.
Sin Nombre virus electron micrograph reference media.

auxiliaryDiscovery.name: Kaggle hantavirus dataset search
auxiliaryDiscovery.notes: Do not train infection diagnosis on Kaggle data unless a dataset slug is manually verified to contain hantavirus-specific image labels and license approval.

auxiliaryDiscovery.name: iRodent: keypoint and segmentation dataset of rodents in the wild
auxiliaryDiscovery.notes: Useful for rodent-host routing/segmentation, not hantavirus infection diagnosis.
